# Bone health & osteoporosis

::: {.callout-note}
## Chapter in preparation
This Part IV chapter is planned but not yet drafted. It will cover bone nutrition — calcium, vitamin D and protein; peak bone mass and age-related loss; dietary risk and protective factors; and when to refer.

Earlier chapters point here for the clinical detail they defer — for now they handle it at
**recognise-and-refer** altitude, and the full management lands in this chapter.
:::
